description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the adnrv/texlive:tools Docker image and defines a global variable FILE set to guia-documentos-tecnicos. Include a before_script that determines TEXMFHOME, creates local tex and bib directories, and converts every SVG in the images/ directory to PDF with inkscape. Add a single build job (default stage) that runs latexmk -pdf -pdflatex="pdflatex --shell-escape %O %S" $FILE and stores the resulting $FILE.pdf as an artifact. No caches, services, or conditional rules are required.
